data.name: Production - Task moved in Kanban (To Do → In Progress) copy

parameters.subject: =Task Started: {{$json.task_title}}
parameters.html:
=

Dear {{$json.project_manager_firstname}} {{$json.project_manager_lastname}},

The task {{$json.task_title}} has been moved to {{$json.new_task_status}}, indicating that work has commenced.

Task Details

Task Title {{$json.task_title}}
Started By {{$json.started_by_firstname}} {{$json.started_by_lastname}}
Current Status {{$json.new_task_status}}
Project {{$json.project_title}}
Milestone {{$json.milestone_title || 'N/A'}}
Task Start Date {{$json.task_start_date}}
Task End Date {{$json.task_end_date}}
Estimated Time (hrs) {{$json.estimated_time}}
Task URL View Task

This update is shared for visibility and tracking purposes.

Regards,
Project Monitoring Team

parameters.query:
WITH latest_task_status AS (
  SELECT
    tsl.*,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
      PARTITION BY tsl.task_management_id
      ORDER BY tsl.created_at DESC
    ) AS rn
  FROM task_status_logs tsl
  WHERE tsl.created_at >= UTC_TIMESTAMP() - INTERVAL 10 MINUTE
)

SELECT
  lts.id                 AS task_status_log_id,
  lts.status             AS new_task_status,
  CONVERT_TZ(lts.created_at, '+00:00', '+05:30') AS status_changed_at,
  lts.created_by_id       AS started_by,

  su.firstname           AS started_by_firstname,
  su.lastname            AS started_by_lastname,
  su.email               AS started_by_email,

  tm.id                  AS task_id,
  tm.title               AS task_title,
  tm.description,
  tm.status              AS task_current_status,
  tm.priority,
  tm.parent_id           AS parent_id,
  tm.estimated_hour      AS estimated_time,
  CONVERT_TZ(tm.expected_start_date, '+00:00', '+05:30') AS task_start_date,
  CONVERT_TZ(tm.target_date, '+00:00', '+05:30') AS task_end_date,

  m.id                   AS milestone_id,
  m.title                AS milestone_title,

  pm.id                  AS project_id,
  pm.title               AS project_title,

  pm_owner.email         AS project_manager_email,
  pm_owner.firstname     AS project_manager_firstname,
  pm_owner.lastname      AS project_manager_lastname,

  rp.id                  AS responsible_person_id,
  rp.firstname           AS responsible_person_first_name,
  rp.lastname            AS responsible_person_last_name,
  rp.email               AS responsible_person_email,

  GROUP_CONCAT(obs.id ORDER BY obs.id) AS observer_ids,
  GROUP_CONCAT(obs.firstname ORDER BY obs.id) AS observer_first_names,
  GROUP_CONCAT(obs.lastname ORDER BY obs.id) AS observer_last_names,
  GROUP_CONCAT(obs.email ORDER BY obs.id) AS observer_emails

FROM latest_task_status lts

JOIN task_managements tm
  ON tm.id = lts.task_management_id

LEFT JOIN project_managements pm
  ON pm.id = tm.project_management_id

LEFT JOIN spree_users pm_owner
  ON pm_owner.id = pm.owner_id

LEFT JOIN milestones m
  ON m.id = tm.milestone_id

LEFT JOIN spree_users rp
  ON rp.id = tm.responsible_person_id

LEFT JOIN spree_users su
  ON su.id = lts.created_by_id

LEFT JOIN task_users tu
  ON tu.task_id = tm.id
  AND tu.user_type = 'observer'
  AND tu.active = 1

LEFT JOIN spree_users obs
  ON obs.id = tu.user_id

WHERE
  lts.rn = 1
  AND tm.parent_id IS NULL
  AND pm_owner.organization_id IN (13, 14, 59, 84)

GROUP BY lts.id;

WITH latest_task_status AS (
  SELECT
    tsl.*,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
      PARTITION BY tsl.task_management_id
      ORDER BY tsl.created_at DESC
    ) AS rn
  FROM task_status_logs tsl
  WHERE tsl.created_at >= UTC_TIMESTAMP() - INTERVAL 160 MINUTE
)

SELECT
  lts.id                 AS task_status_log_id,
  lts.status             AS new_task_status,
  CONVERT_TZ(lts.created_at, '+00:00', '+05:30') AS status_changed_at,
  lts.created_by_id       AS started_by,

  su.firstname           AS started_by_firstname,
  su.lastname            AS started_by_lastname,
  su.email               AS started_by_email,

  tm.id                  AS task_id,
  tm.title               AS task_title,
  tm.description,
  tm.status              AS task_current_status,
  tm.priority,
  tm.parent_id           AS parent_id,
  tm.estimated_hour      AS estimated_time,
  CONVERT_TZ(tm.expected_start_date, '+00:00', '+05:30') AS task_start_date,
  CONVERT_TZ(tm.target_date, '+00:00', '+05:30') AS task_end_date,

  -- milestone (optional)
  m.id                   AS milestone_id,
  m.title                AS milestone_title,

  -- project (direct from task)
  pm.id                  AS project_id,
  pm.title               AS project_title,

  -- project manager
  pm_owner.email         AS project_manager_email,
  pm_owner.firstname     AS project_manager_firstname,
  pm_owner.lastname      AS project_manager_lastname,

  -- responsible person
  rp.id                  AS responsible_person_id,
  rp.firstname           AS responsible_person_first_name,
  rp.lastname            AS responsible_person_last_name,
  rp.email               AS responsible_person_email

FROM latest_task_status lts

JOIN task_managements tm
  ON tm.id = lts.task_management_id

-- project join directly from task
LEFT JOIN project_managements pm
  ON pm.id = tm.project_management_id

-- project manager
LEFT JOIN spree_users pm_owner
  ON pm_owner.id = pm.owner_id

-- milestone (optional)
LEFT JOIN milestones m
  ON m.id = tm.milestone_id

-- responsible person
LEFT JOIN spree_users rp
  ON rp.id = tm.responsible_person_id

-- started by user
LEFT JOIN spree_users su
  ON su.id = lts.created_by_id

WHERE
  lts.rn = 1
  AND tm.parent_id IS NULL;

  su.email               AS started_by_email,

  tm.id                  AS task_id,
  tm.title               AS task_title,
  tm.description,
  tm.status              AS task_current_status,
  tm.priority,
  tm.parent_id           AS parent_id,
  tm.estimated_hour      AS estimated_time,
  CONVERT_TZ(tm.expected_start_date, '+00:00', '+05:30') AS task_start_date,

  pm.title               AS project_title,

  pm_owner.firstname     AS project_manager_firstname,
  pm_owner.lastname      AS project_manager_lastname,

  -- responsible person
  rp.id                  AS responsible_person_id,
  rp.firstname           AS responsible_person_first_name,
  rp.lastname            AS responsible_person_last_name,
  rp.email               AS responsible_person_email,

  -- observers (aggregated)
  GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT obs.id ORDER BY obs.id) AS observer_ids,
  GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT obs.firstname ORDER BY obs.id) AS observer_first_names,
  GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT obs.lastname ORDER BY obs.id) AS observer_last_names,
  GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT obs.email ORDER BY obs.id) AS observer_emails

-- project join directly from task

  ON pm.id = tm.project_management_id

-- project manager
LEFT JOIN spree_users pm_owner
  ON pm_owner.id = pm.owner_id

-- milestone (optional)
LEFT JOIN milestones m
  ON m.id = tm.milestone_id

-- responsible person
LEFT JOIN spree_users rp
  ON rp.id = tm.responsible_person_id

-- started by user
LEFT JOIN spree_users su
  ON su.id = lts.created_by_id

-- observers
LEFT JOIN task_users tu
  ON tu.task_id = tm.id
  AND tu.user_type = 'observer'
  AND tu.active = 1

LEFT JOIN spree_users obs
  ON obs.id = tu.user_id

WHERE
  lts.rn = 1
  AND tm.parent_id IS NULL

GROUP BY lts.id;
